implementation_instructions.unit_movement: Unit movement should be evaluated for each unit type from top to bottom, executing the first matching condition. If no condition matches, perform the wait move.
implementation_instructions.shared_functions: Use existing shared functions where applicable.
implementation_instructions.unit_order: Sea units first, then air, then land. Within sea units: Transport with Army > other Sea > Bomber > Fighter > other Land.

phases.Explore: Fully explore starting island and take all cities.
phases.Expand: Home island secure — build transports, push armies to other islands.
phases.Combat: First enemy contact made — prioritize combat.

conditions: Can reach neutral city on current island

Move toward enemy city and take it

conditions: Adjacent to friendly transport with room
Explore.action: Board transport to explore new islands

shared_functions.current_phase: Returns if we are in expansion, exploration or combat phase.
shared_functions.movement_to_nearest_friendly_coastal: For units needing to find friendly coastal cities.
shared_functions.board_transport: Handling boarding logic across unit types.
shared_functions.disembark: When transport lands and units need to disembark.
shared_functions.valid_target: Determine if a unit can attack a given square.
shared_functions.within_range: Determine if one unit is within range of another square or unit.
shared_functions.is_island_fully_explored: Determine if a land square belongs to a fully explored island.
shared_functions.is_island_contested: Determine if a land square belongs to a contested island (at least one enemy city or unit).
shared_functions.production_value_of_enemy_square: Sum up the enemy production value at a square.
shared_functions.transport_capacity_at_max: Check if transport is carrying maximum cargo.
shared_functions.transport_capacity_not_at_max: Check if transport is NOT carrying maximum cargo.
shared_functions.transport_has_no_army_onboard: Check if transport currently has no armies loaded.
shared_functions.another_transport_with_equal_or_fewer_ar: Check if there is another friendly transport at the same island with equal or fewer armies onboard. Pass the current transport unit to this function.
shared_functions.transport_is_offshore_waiting: Check if transport is parked on ocean adjacent to friendly city and waiting for armies.
shared_functions.enemy_within_range: Check if enemy unit is within movement range.
shared_functions.friendly_city_under_attack: Check if any friendly city has enemy army within 3 squares.
